spec: RFC-0008 §1.1, RFC 8949 §3 major type 4, §4.2.1 shortest-form length headers

vectors.name: nested [[1,2],[3]]
vectors.notes: outer array of 2 inner arrays. 6 bytes.

vectors.name: 23 items (last 1-byte header form)
vectors.notes: initial byte 0x97 = major 4, length 23; followed by 23 × 0x00

vectors.name: 24 items (first 2-byte header form)
vectors.notes: initial byte 0x98 = major 4, info 24 (1-byte length follows); length byte 0x18 = 24

negative_vectors.name: underfill (declared 3, only 2 items present)
negative_vectors.notes: header announces 3 items but only 2 follow; decoder hits EOF mid-container

negative_vectors.name: indefinite-length array
negative_vectors.notes: initial byte 0x9f = major 4, info 31 (indefinite); forbidden by §4.2.1

negative_vectors.name: non-shortest length header (length 3 in 2-byte form)
negative_vectors.notes: length 3 fits in initial byte alone (0x83); 2-byte form 0x98 0x03 is non-shortest
